{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Titan Forge
| introduced = lh-03-the-knight
}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Titan Forge]] is located on the second moon of [[Delsin]] and has been abandoned.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c10">''The Knight'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon locations]]
[[Category:Structures]]
